description: The Sprint 3 Edge Case Catalog section is empty — the Edge Case Catalog table (lines 365-383, EC-FEED-001 through EC-FEED-015) has no new entries for Sprint 3. REQ-FEED-024 documents body extraction edge cases in prose ("If note_id is not found in note_metadata, emit with body: ''") but this is not indexed in the catalog. Additionally, the `editing_session_state_changed` emit-before-`feed_state_changed` ordering described in verification-architecture.md §12 line 540 is not captured as an edge case.

evidence.snippet: If note_id is not found in note_metadata, emit with `body: ""`.

remediationSuggestion: Add two new EC entries: (1) EC-FEED-016: note_id not found in note_metadata during select_past_note → emit editing_session_state_changed with body: ''; (2) EC-FEED-017: editing_session_state_changed emitted before feed_state_changed → EditorPane receives state update before feed list re-renders.
